notes:
v1.0.8 — Major feature update: 50+ new features matching Windows File Explorer

• Inline rename (click to rename in-place, F2)
• Keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter to open, Shift+Arrow to extend selection)
• New Folder with inline creation (Ctrl+Shift+N, right-click empty space)
• File conflict dialog (Replace / Skip / Keep Both) before any paste
• Undo/Redo for file operations (Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Y)
• Rubber-band lasso selection
• Invert selection (Ctrl+I)
• Right-click empty space: New Folder, Sort by, Paste, Refresh, Properties
• Properties dialog (General tab: size, dates, attributes, NTFS flags)
• Open With dialog — choose which app opens a file
• Run as Administrator in context menu
• Create ZIP from selection (right-click Compress to ZIP)
• Extract archive to custom path (Extract to…)
• Create Shortcut (.lnk) from right-click
• Open file location for .lnk shortcuts
• Set as Desktop Background for images
• Print file from right-click
• Eject removable drives from sidebar
• NTFS compressed files shown in blue, encrypted in green
• Address bar autocomplete as you type (Tab to complete)
• Address bar history dropdown
• Column drag-to-reorder and double-click to auto-size
• Checkbox selection mode toggle
• Show/hide file extensions toggle
• F4/Ctrl+L focuses address bar, Ctrl+E focuses search, F11 toggles fullscreen
• Alt+P toggles preview panel, Alt+Enter opens Properties
• Status bar shows folder/file count breakdown + drive free space
• Breadcrumb segments are now drop targets for drag-and-drop
• Sidebar drive entries show eject button for removable media
